user.title: Enable Banking Setup
user.description:
Enter your Enable Banking API credentials.

Create your application at [{enablebanking_url}]({enablebanking_url}) and download the private key.

**Security:** Your credentials are encrypted and stored locally in Home Assistant. They are never sent to any third party except Enable Banking.

After setup, open the **Finance** sidebar panel to connect your bank.

error.missing_credentials: Please enter both Application ID and Private Key.
error.invalid_credentials: Could not connect to Enable Banking. Please verify your API credentials.
error.no_institutions: No banking institutions found for Germany.
error.connection_failed: Connection to Enable Banking failed. Please check your internet connection.

confirm_transfer_chain.name: Confirm transfer chain
confirm_transfer_chain.description: Confirm or reject a detected transfer chain.

confirmed.name: Confirmed
confirmed.description: True to confirm, false to reject

init.title: Restart Home Assistant
init.description:
Finance has been updated to version {version}. Home Assistant must be restarted to apply the update.

Click **Submit** to restart now.

reconfigure_required.title: Finance: Reconfiguration Required
reconfigure_required.description: Finance has switched from GoCardless to Enable Banking. Please reconfigure with your Enable Banking credentials via Settings > Integrations.
